attributes.description: Workload monitoring with Deployments, DaemonSets, StatefulSets, Jobs, container restart trends, and deployment drilldowns.

embeddableConfig.description: Navigation links to other K8s dashboards.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.deployment.available IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.deployment.name)

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.deployment.available IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.deployment.name)

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS max_restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts) BY k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name
| STATS total_restarts = SUM(max_restarts)

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS max_restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts) BY k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name
| STATS total_restarts = SUM(max_restarts)

embeddableConfig.description: Total container restarts. MAX(k8s.container.restarts) per pod+container, then SUM.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS max_restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts) BY k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name
| STATS total_restarts = SUM(max_restarts)

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND (k8s.deployment.available IS NOT NULL OR k8s.deployment.desired IS NOT NULL)
| STATS
    available = SUM(k8s.deployment.available),
    desired = SUM(k8s.deployment.desired)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(1 minute)
| KEEP timestamp, available, desired

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND (k8s.deployment.available IS NOT NULL OR k8s.deployment.desired IS NOT NULL)
| STATS
    available = SUM(k8s.deployment.available),
    desired = SUM(k8s.deployment.desired)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(1 minute)
| KEEP timestamp, available, desired

embeddableConfig.description: Deployment replica trend. SUM(k8s.deployment.available) vs SUM(k8s.deployment.desired) per 1m bucket.

query.esql:
TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND (k8s.deployment.available IS NOT NULL OR k8s.deployment.desired IS NOT NULL)
| STATS
    available = SUM(k8s.deployment.available),
    desired = SUM(k8s.deployment.desired)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(1 minute)
| KEEP timestamp, available, desired

embeddableConfig.title: Deployment replicas over time

query.esql:
TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.daemonset.name IS NOT NULL
  AND (k8s.daemonset.current_scheduled_nodes IS NOT NULL OR k8s.daemonset.desired_scheduled_nodes IS NOT NULL)
| STATS
    `Current scheduled` = SUM(k8s.daemonset.current_scheduled_nodes),
    `Desired scheduled` = SUM(k8s.daemonset.desired_scheduled_nodes),
    Ready = SUM(k8s.daemonset.ready_nodes)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(1 minute)
| KEEP timestamp, `Desired scheduled`, `Current scheduled`, Ready

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.daemonset.name IS NOT NULL
  AND (k8s.daemonset.current_scheduled_nodes IS NOT NULL OR k8s.daemonset.desired_scheduled_nodes IS NOT NULL)
| STATS
    `Current scheduled` = SUM(k8s.daemonset.current_scheduled_nodes),
    `Desired scheduled` = SUM(k8s.daemonset.desired_scheduled_nodes),
    Ready = SUM(k8s.daemonset.ready_nodes)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(1 minute)
| KEEP timestamp, `Desired scheduled`, `Current scheduled`, Ready

embeddableConfig.description: DaemonSet scheduling trend. SUM of desired, scheduled, and ready nodes per 1m bucket.

query.esql:
TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.daemonset.name IS NOT NULL
  AND (k8s.daemonset.current_scheduled_nodes IS NOT NULL OR k8s.daemonset.desired_scheduled_nodes IS NOT NULL)
| STATS
    current_scheduled = SUM(k8s.daemonset.current_scheduled_nodes),
    desired_scheduled = SUM(k8s.daemonset.desired_scheduled_nodes),
    ready = SUM(k8s.daemonset.ready_nodes)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(1 minute)
| KEEP timestamp, desired_scheduled, current_scheduled, ready

embeddableConfig.title: DaemonSet scheduling over time

embeddableConfig.description: Container restarts over time per deployment. max(k8s.container.restarts) broken down by k8s.deployment.name.
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 deployments by container restarts

StatefulSet listing with current/desired/ready/updated pod counts.
Job listing with active/successful/failed/desired pod counts.
